name: Bryant-Li-Bhoj neurodevelopmental syndrome
definition: AD de novo. PS2:de_novo_strong PM1:histone_fold_domain PM2:absent_gnomAD_v4 PP3:CADD>25. H3-3A encodes histone H3.3; variants disrupt DAXX/HIRA chaperone interaction. ~50 cases reported 2020-2024. Features: intellectual disability (100%), absent/limited speech (95%), seizures (60%), autism/behavioral (50%), hypotonia, feeding difficulties. VUS p.Ala2Thr: PS2_Moderate (de novo) + PM1 + PM2_Supporting; upgrade needs functional H3K4/K36 methylation assay or additional case matching via GeneMatcher/MME.

acmg_evidence.population_frequency: PM2: p.Ala2Thr absent from gnomAD v4 controls (AC=0); LoF constraint pLI~0.9
acmg_evidence.functional: PM1: histone fold domain critical for H3.3-DAXX/HIRA interaction; PP3: CADD>25 for missense at Ala2; PS3 pending: no published functional assay for p.Ala2Thr specifically
acmg_evidence.family_segregation: PS2: all reported BRYLIBS cases are de novo; PS2_Moderate applied when parental mosaicism not excluded
acmg_evidence.phenotype_match: PP4: NDD+seizures+de_novo_H3.3 is highly specific; HPO match: intellectual disability HP:0001249, seizures HP:0001250, speech delay HP:0000750
acmg_evidence.variant_specificity: PM5: other H3-3A missense at K27/K36 reported pathogenic; p.Ala2Thr at N-terminal tail—check ClinVar for same-codon entries; HGMD lists H3F3A pathogenic variants

name: Neurodevelopmental disorder with or without nonimmune hydrops fetalis
definition: AR biallelic. PVS1:c.253A>T(p.Lys85Ter)_nonsense_NMD. PM2:c.253A>T_absent_gnomAD. Compound_het requires TRANS phasing by WGS/Sanger. Single heterozygous insufficient for AR disease. PIK3C2A encodes class-II PI3-kinase; regulates endosomal PI3P and mTOR. Features: intellectual disability, developmental delay, facial dysmorphism, proportionate short stature, seizures. c.3449T>C(p.Leu1150Ser) VUS: PM2_Supporting only—upgrade needs PI3K kinase activity assay or additional trans-heterozygous case. Verify mother phenotype: if carrier+unaffected confirms AR not dominant.

acmg_evidence.population_frequency: PM2: c.253A>T absent/extremely_rare gnomAD; c.3449T>C PM2_Supporting (rare but present in carriers)
acmg_evidence.functional: PVS1: c.253A>T nonsense → NMD predicted; c.3449T>C missense: PP3 in silico pathogenic but no functional data (PS3 absent)
acmg_evidence.family_segregation: PP1/PM3: compound het MUST be in trans—maternal LP + paternal VUS; long-read WGS or Sanger phasing mandatory; if trans confirmed PM3 applies
acmg_evidence.phenotype_match: PP4: moderate specificity—NDD matches but not exclusive; AR pattern critical
acmg_evidence.variant_specificity: ClinVar: c.253A>T not yet well-documented; c.3449T>C no pathogenic entries; HGMD PIK3C2A LoF variants listed

name: Retinitis pigmentosa 13
definition: AD haploinsufficiency. PVS1:c.1298delC(p.Glu433Alafs*14)_frameshift_NMD. PM2:absent_gnomAD_pLI=1.0. PRPF8 encodes U5 snRNP spliceosome component; haploinsufficiency causes photoreceptor degeneration. Typical RP13: progressive rod-cone dystrophy, night blindness onset 2nd-3rd decade, bone-spicule pigmentation, reduced ERG, visual field constriction. CAUTION: morning glory disc anomaly (HP:0025514) NOT typical RP13—suggests P005 has additional/independent etiology. Mother carrier unaffected: incomplete penetrance possible or maternal variant de novo. ERG + OCT mandatory to confirm RP13 diagnosis.

acmg_evidence.population_frequency: PM2: c.1298delC absent gnomAD v4; PRPF8 LoF constraint pLI=1.0 (high intolerance)
acmg_evidence.functional: PVS1: frameshift → premature stop → NMD; PRPF8 haploinsufficiency mechanism established for RP13
acmg_evidence.family_segregation: PVS1+PM2=LP; maternal inheritance reduces PS2; if mother unaffected carrier→penetrance incomplete; family ophthalmology exam recommended
acmg_evidence.phenotype_match: PP4: partial match—RP features overlap but morning glory disc unexpected; BS2: morning glory not in RP13 phenotype spectrum
acmg_evidence.variant_specificity: ClinVar: PRPF8 frameshift/nonsense variants classified Pathogenic/LP for RP13; HGMD PRPF8 multiple LoF entries

name: Usher syndrome type 1D
definition: AR biallelic. PM3_Supporting:compound_het_unphased. USH1D obligate triad: congenital profound SNHL (100%) + vestibular areflexia (100%) + RP onset 1st-2nd decade (100%). ABSENCE of hearing loss in P005 = strong evidence AGAINST USH1D (BS2/BP2). CDH23 single heterozygous insufficient. Compound het requires TRANS phasing—parental Sanger mandatory. CDH23 biallelic also causes DFNB12 (isolated AR hearing loss). VUS upgrade path: confirm trans arrangement + audiogram (SNHL expected) + vestibular testing. If no SNHL found, CDH23 role unlikely for USH1D.

acmg_evidence.population_frequency: PM2: individual CDH23 variants rare; compound het carriers ~1:500 in some populations
acmg_evidence.functional: PM3: compound het PM3_Supporting only without phasing; CDH23 encodes tip-link protein essential for hair cell mechanotransduction
acmg_evidence.family_segregation: PP1: trans confirmation essential; if trans confirmed PM3 upgrades to PM3_Strong for two LP/P variants in trans
acmg_evidence.phenotype_match: BS4/BS2: absence of congenital deafness in P005 STRONGLY argues AGAINST USH1D; audiogram + BAER required
acmg_evidence.variant_specificity: ClinVar: CDH23 compound het pathogenic for USH1D well-documented when deafness present; without deafness diagnosis questionable

name: Oguchi disease 1
definition: AR biallelic. PVS1_Moderate:splice_del_partial_effect. BP2:single_heterozygous_INSUFFICIENT_for_AR. SAG encodes retinal S-antigen (arrestin-1); biallelic LoF abolishes rod phototransduction termination. Oguchi disease: congenital stationary night blindness (non-progressive), Mizuo-Nakamura phenomenon (golden-yellow fundus in light, normalizes after dark adaptation), normal visual acuity, normal ERG after prolonged dark adaptation. Distinct from RP—non-progressive. For P005: single maternal SAG LP variant CANNOT cause Oguchi alone—second allele required. Search for second SAG variant; if not found, SAG is carrier finding only.

acmg_evidence.population_frequency: PM2: SAG splice del absent/rare gnomAD; SAG LoF carriers ~1:1000
acmg_evidence.functional: PVS1_Moderate: splice variant may have partial effect; RNA-seq or minigene needed to confirm exon skipping
acmg_evidence.family_segregation: BP2: heterozygous SAG insufficient for AR Oguchi disease; second allele must be identified; carrier testing of father recommended
acmg_evidence.phenotype_match: BS2: night blindness (HP:0000662) absent in P005; Mizuo-Nakamura phenomenon not reported; phenotype does NOT match Oguchi
acmg_evidence.variant_specificity: ClinVar: SAG biallelic LoF variants classified Pathogenic for Oguchi disease; heterozygous LP insufficient

name: Bainbridge-Ropers syndrome
definition: AD de novo LoF. PS2:de_novo_PS2_Strong. PM2:absent_gnomAD. ASXL3 intronic VUS: PM2_Supporting_only—NO functional evidence without RNA-seq/minigene showing splice effect. ASXL3 encodes epigenetic regulator (Polycomb/Trithorax). BRPS features: severe-profound intellectual disability (absent/minimal speech), feeding difficulties, hypotonia, autism spectrum behaviors (repetitive/stereotyped movements HP:0000733), characteristic facies (arched eyebrows, deep-set eyes, upturned nose, thin upper lip). Eye abnormalities NOT core BRPS feature. If intronic variant confirmed de novo: PS2+PM2=LP. Upgrade path: RNA-seq blood/fibroblast for splice detection + parental de novo confirmation.

acmg_evidence.population_frequency: PM2: ASXL3 intronic variant absent/rare gnomAD; PM2_Supporting for intronic without splice proof; LoF pLI=1.0
acmg_evidence.functional: PVS1 NOT applicable without splice evidence; PS3 absent; need minigene assay or blood RNA-seq to confirm exon skipping
acmg_evidence.family_segregation: PS2: if de novo confirmed by parental Sanger → PS2_Strong; trio WGS or targeted parental testing required
acmg_evidence.phenotype_match: PP4: intellectual disability + autism + stereotypy (HP:0000733) highly matches BRPS core phenotype; eye anomalies not typical
acmg_evidence.variant_specificity: PM5: other ASXL3 LoF (frameshift/nonsense) pathogenic; intronic needs splice confirmation; check ClinVar ASXL3 intronic entries
